introSection: Tater Bug Terror was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Adventurers Family Entertainment Center.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride is assumed to open as Kiddie Coaster, with the ride receiving a new name and trains around 2002 - 2005.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Unpainted track track and blue supports.

fullText:
Tater Bug Terror was a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Adventurers Family Entertainment Center.

The ride is assumed to open as Kiddie Coaster, with the ride receiving a new name and trains around 2002 - 2005.



Unpainted track track and blue supports.
